ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pitches" (
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch */,
  "pitch_title" TEXT /* Title of the pitch */,
  "pitch_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pitch */,
  "pitch_date" TEXT /* Date when the pitch was submitted */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the industry related to the pitch */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the institution of the entrepreneur */,
  "entrepreneur_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entrepreneur submitting the pitch */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Achievements of the entrepreneur */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills possessed by the entrepreneur */,
  "pitch_status_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the current status of the pitch */,
  "pitch_benchmark" INTEGER /* ID referencing the industry benchmarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_entrepreneur_id FOREIGN KEY ("entrepreneur_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_pitch_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_status_id") REFERENCES pitch_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitches_pitch_benchmark FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_benchmark") REFERENCES industries ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the industry benchmarks */,
  "success_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics used to evaluate success in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., University, Startup Incubator) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Level of expertise in the skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., entrepreneur, investor, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the investment */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitch receiving the investment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount invested */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "investment_status" TEXT /* Status of the investment (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitches ("pitch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitch being analyzed */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the pitch has received */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads of the pitch materials */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given to the pitch by viewers */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A score representing user engagement with the pitch */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Rate at which views convert to investments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitches ("pitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement record */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitch associated with the achievement */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was made */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (e.g., award, publication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitches ("pitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitch being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user along with the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitches ("pitch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the investment */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitch that was invested in */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "investment_status" TEXT /* Status of the investment (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_history_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitches ("pitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitch whose status is being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pitch (e.g., under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitch_status_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitches ("pitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., pitch update, new comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
